meta.title: mutav — rent insurance, the way it should work
meta.description: MUTAV — Brazilian rental guarantee protocol. When tenants miss payments, settlement is automatic. No paperwork, no queue.
meta.ogTitle: mutav — rent insurance, the way it should work
meta.ogDescription: Programmable rental guarantee. Automated settlement, verifiable record.

hero.subhead: When the tenant is late, you get paid. No form, no queue, no intermediary deciding when to settle. The protocol sends the payout automatically — and every payout is recorded, public, and verifiable.
hero.manifesto: The protocol that doesn't fail when the market fails.

socialProof.h2: Built with people who know the market.

items.name: Cinara Bigóis
items.role: 30 years in the Southern Brazil rental market
items.body: A reference in Southern Brazil's rental segment. Partner in designing MUTAV's operational model from day one — the guarantee gap was identified directly in the field, alongside people who run the market every day.

art37.h2: Backed by Art. 37 of the Tenant Protection Act.
art37.body: MUTAV operates as an institutional guarantor under Art. 37, clause I of Law 8.245/91 — the same law that governs all rental contracts in Brazil. For the agency: no change to the lease agreement. For the tenant: no guarantor, no deposit, no traditional surety bond. For the landlord: automatic coverage.
art37.note: We are new to the market. Our legal foundation is public, verifiable, and the same as always.

gap.h2: Renters and investors pay for the same broken layer.

items.label: Time
items.headline: Settlement can wait 60 days.
items.body: Rent can't. Whole families cover mortgages on rent that never arrives.

items.label: Opacity
items.headline: Guarantees nobody audits.
items.body: Traditional providers don't publish payout history. When they collapse, nobody sees it coming.

items.label: Fragility
items.headline: 2025. The market failed. Thousands of contracts affected.
items.body: When a concentrated provider falls, the whole market feels it. MUTAV distributes the risk — the fund doesn't depend on any single player staying solvent.

items.label: Approval
items.note: Automatic analysis — no queue, no meeting.

items.label: Tenant fee
items.note: Calculated by risk profile. No cost to the agency.

items.label: Cost to the agency
items.note: MUTAV charges nothing to the agency. The fee is paid by the tenant alongside rent.

custoAprovacao.note: Reference figures. Final details confirmed before launch.

vision.kicker: the path — no dates, no promises
vision.h2: We start with the guarantee. The whole rental layer comes after.

phases.label: Now
phases.title: Rental guarantee
phases.body: Automatic payout to the landlord on default. Programmatic settlement, public record.

phases.label: Next
phases.title: On-chain reputation score
phases.body: Payment history as verifiable reputation — for tenants, landlords, and agencies.

phases.label: After
phases.title: MUTAV — programmable exposure
phases.body: Investors access the rental-market spread with verifiable NAV and an on-chain settlement log.

phases.label: Horizon
phases.title: Programmable payments and funds
phases.body: Optimizing what most blocks the rental market — transactions, payments, fund custody. Where it makes sense.

bifurcation.h2Line2: We'll let you know when we're ready.

cards.label: Agency / Landlord
cards.body: You rent, manage, or own property. You want a guarantee that pays.
cards.aria: Jump to the landlord and agency waitlist

cards.label: Investor
cards.body: You operate on Stellar or DeFi. You want real yield with verifiable collateral.

items: When the tenant is late, you get paid.
No form. No queue. No call to support.
The money lands in the registered account — automatically.

cobertura.body: Our coverage comes from a fund backed by international investors, allocated in tokenized Brazilian treasury and managed by our programmable infrastructure. Every payout is recorded — the backing is verifiable, not a promise.

imobiliaria.dignity: We'll let you know when we're ready. We won't spam.
imobiliaria.consent: By joining the list, you consent to the use of your email to receive updates about MUTAV. You can leave any time — just reply to any email with "unsubscribe".

items: No guarantor. No deposit. No traditional surety bond.
MUTAV replaces all of it — one monthly fee built into the rent bill.
Credit protection included: in case of income loss, the tenant has coverage.
seguroPrestamista.note: Three sides of the contract. One protocol that serves all of them.

items: Exposure to the Brazilian rental-guarantee spread — specificity generic pools don't have.
Programmatic settlement on-chain. Audit report and code open.
Named founders. Not an anonymous project.

founders.name: Matheus "Draau" de Pauli
founders.bio: 5+ years building brands at the intersection of technology, brand, and market. Multidisciplinary team coordination and blockchain product development. Co-founder of No Bloco. Direct exposure to the Southern Brazil real estate network gave him the first look at the rental guarantee gap.

founders.name: Julia Hoffmann Buratto
founders.bio: Founder of jubs.studio. Launched Chainless in 2023, from zero to 30,000 users, still running. Works at the intersection of systems architecture, UX, and onchain infrastructure, with experience in fintech and Web3 products.

footer.tagline: Rent insurance, the way it should work.
footer.subtitle: Rental guarantee protocol built on Stellar.

success.imobiliaria: received — you're on the list. We'll let you know when we're ready.
